profile.name: Toan Hoang
profile.bio: 15+ years in software development and technical leadership. Specializing in Blockchain, AI integration, high-load systems, and cross-platform engineering.

certifications: Architecting with Google Kubernetes Engine: Foundations
Essential Google Cloud Infrastructure: Core Services

projects.title: Behavior Tree Playground
projects.description: Simple Behavior tree designer app using React Flow + Zustand.

projects.title: Simple Chess Solver
projects.description: Simple chess solver using custom alpha-beta pruning algorithm.

experience.description: Leading full-stack development of the Blockpass eKYC platform using ReactJS/NextJS and SailsJS/ExpressJS. Designed scalable, high-load architectures with Websockets and Moleculer. Managed decentralized blockchain infrastructure via GKE, proprietary nodes, and Infura. Drove adoption of Event-Based Architecture and Test Driven Development across the team.

Led teams building decentralized services and full-stack applications using ReactJS and ReactNative. Designed, deployed, and audited Smart Contracts on Ethereum (Solidity). Conducted in-depth research on blockchain systems and represented the company as a speaker at external tech events.

Maintained and enhanced existing educational games. Developed a new WebGL branch using Unity3D, built server-side services with NodeJS and PHP, and created learning applications for children using Electron and AngularJS.

Led development of Captain Strike, a third-person multiplayer shooter — responsible for game architecture, GLSL shader programming, core multiplayer (client and server), backend services, and game admin tooling. Also shipped Blocks Buddies, a cross-platform puzzle game with async multiplayer built in Unity.

Progressed from Game Programmer to iOS Programmer Supervisor. Ported and shipped titles across iOS, Windows Mobile, Symbian, PalmOS, and Nokia MeeGo platforms (Asphalt, NOVA, Real Football, GT Racing). Led an elite iOS team and supervised MeeGo projects, three of which reached the market.
